allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix OAuth re-login: eliminate race between getSession and onAuthStateChange

The PKCE code exchange triggered both getSession\(\) and onAuthStateChange
to fire concurrently, causing duplicate ensureProfile\(\) calls that raced.
Additionally, INITIAL_SESSION event \(with null session\) could resolve
loading before SIGNED_IN event arrived with the actual session.

- Unify both auth paths into a single resolveAuth\(\) function with
  initialResolved flag to prevent double-processing
- Allow late-arriving sessions to override earlier null-session resolutions
- Clean ?code= and ?state= from URL after code exchange completes
  \(prevents stale code errors on page refresh\)
- Reduce grace period from 15s to 8s for faster error feedback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
